_comment: GENERATED by scripts/ingest-r2-assets.mjs. Until the owner runs it (with R2 creds), r2PublicBase is empty and BoxedWine ships as a ready shell. Point --src at a folder containing the wasm engine (boxedwine.js/.wasm/boxedwine-shell.js/browserfs.boxedwine.js) + the LGPL Wine environment (free). NEVER upload proprietary Windows software.
